handoff.summary: Integration gate FAILED with blocking issues in schema compliance, dependency output completeness, commit/file declaration integrity, acceptance criteria coverage, and state/status synchronization.
next_steps: Create and commit missing outputs for A1_wire_execute_prompt, A2_wire_execute_all, and A3_provider_configuration.
Fix A0_bootstrap.json change_details entries to schema-compliant objects with repo/file/action.
Correct A4_webview_error_boundary.json commit_shas/change_details so declared files match the referenced commit(s).
Implement and test AC1-AC5 and AC8, including command wiring, output logging, cancellation, and provider token configuration.
Update workpack.state.json and 99_status.md to reflect actual prompt/output progress before rerunning V1.
known_issues: executePrompt and executeAll remain stub implementations that display runtime wiring pending messages.
CopilotProvider maxPromptTokens is still hardcoded to 8192 and no workpackManager.copilot.maxPromptTokens setting is declared.
Workpack detail-panel fallback test exists but is excluded by vitest include allowlist.
Prompt/output state tracking files are stale relative to observed outputs and branch commits.

notes:
Merge decision: FAIL (blocking issues present).

Acceptance Criteria Coverage
| AC ID | Status | Evidence |
| AC1 | fail | src/commands/register-commands.ts executePrompt still shows pending stub message and does not dispatch ExecutionOrchestrator. |
| AC2 | fail | src/commands/register-commands.ts executeAll still shows pending stub message and does not dispatch ExecutionOrchestrator. |
| AC3 | fail | No execution OutputChannel wiring is present in command execution paths. |
| AC4 | fail | No progress-cancellation wiring (AbortController/CancellationToken) exists in executePrompt/executeAll command handlers. |
| AC5 | fail | src/agents/providers/copilot-provider.ts keeps hardcoded maxPromptTokens=8192 and package.json has no workpackManager.copilot.maxPromptTokens setting. |
| AC6 | pass | src/views/workpack-detail-panel.ts wraps HTML render path in try/catch, logs to output channel, and returns fallback HTML. |
| AC7 | fail | npm run test passes, but command wiring logic is not implemented and not covered; detail-panel fallback test is excluded by vitest.config.ts include list. |
| AC8 | fail | Tree refresh after prompt execution cannot be satisfied because prompt execution wiring is not implemented. |
